login.formText: Log in to complete, modify, or delete your data.
login.notRegistered: Not registered yet? Do it directly here.
login.popoverPhone: As your username, use the phone number you provided while registering

inscription.heading: Registration
inscription.groupText1: We invite you to register your details with us
inscription.groupText2: Your personal details are kept confidential
inscription.groupText3: Take a few minutes to register !
inscription.groupText4: Take a few minutes to register !
inscription.geoText: Please verify that your address has been correctly geolocated. If not, you can adjust your position by moving the red marker on the map.
inscription.popoverAddress: Postal address: the Alert System uses this address to identify people within the risk area and notify them if necessary.
inscription.popoverHousehold: Number of people in the household: the Alert System uses this to estimate how many people will be notified via the primary contact.
inscription.popoverPhone: Your primary number serves as your login for the personal area. This number will receive alerts. To add a foreign number, select the correct flag first.
inscription.popoverPhone2: To add a foreign number, select the correct flag first.
inscription.popoverSms: This number is only used for SMS alerts. To receive voice calls, add the number to the phone list.
inscription.rgpdCheckbox: Your Company only processes data collected
inscription.existAlert: This account has already been validated. Please log in using your credentials on the homepage.

emailConfirmation.heading: Confirm your account
emailConfirmation.text: Please click the button below to validate your account.
emailConfirmation.successAlert: Your account has been successfully validated

edit.savedText: Your data has been successfully saved. You are now logged out. You can log in anytime to access, modify, or delete your data.

changePassword.heading: Change password
changePassword.pwdRules: Your password must be at least 12 characters
changePassword.successMsg: Your password has been successfully changed
changePassword.logoutText: Your data has been successfully saved. You can log in anytime to access, modify, or delete it.

unsubscribe.successText: Your account has been successfully deleted. Thank you for using the Alert System.

search.fieldLabel: Select the field you want to search

editContact.successAlert: Your information has been successfully saved
editContact.vacationerText: Check this box if you are a vacationer or occasional resident.
editContact.confirmDialog: Are you sure you want to unsubscribe this user
editContact.unsubscribedText: The user has been successfully unsubscribed

unsubContact.confirmDialog: Are you sure you want to unsubscribe this user
unsubContact.unsubscribedText: The user has been successfully unsubscribed
